case_title: EDWARD BOUCHER VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-24-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-05-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
